name: Arduino Uno R3
description: The Arduino Uno R3 is the perfect board to get started with electronics and coding. It features the ATmega328P microcontroller with 14 digital I/O pins, 6 analog inputs, and a 16 MHz quartz crystal.

name: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B
description: The Raspberry Pi 4 Model B is the latest product in the popular Raspberry Pi range of computers. It offers ground-breaking increases in processor speed, multimedia performance, memory, and connectivity.

name: ESP32 Development Board
description: The ESP32 is a powerful dual-core microcontroller with integrated Wi-Fi and Bluetooth. Perfect for IoT projects, it features ultra-low power consumption and rich peripheral interfaces.

name: DHT22 Temperature Humidity Sensor
description: The DHT22 is a basic, low-cost digital temperature and humidity sensor. It uses a capacitive humidity sensor and a thermistor to measure the surrounding air.

name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
description: The HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor uses sonar to determine distance to an object like bats do. It offers excellent non-contact range detection with high accuracy.

name: MPU6050 6-Axis Accelerometer Gyroscope
description: The MPU6050 is the world's first integrated 6-axis MotionTracking device that combines a 3-axis gyroscope and 3-axis accelerometer on the same silicon die.

name: BMP280 Barometric Pressure Sensor
description: The BMP280 is an absolute barometric pressure sensor especially designed for mobile applications. It offers high accuracy and low power consumption.

name: NodeMCU ESP8266
description: NodeMCU is an open source IoT platform. It uses the Lua scripting language and is based on the eLua project. Built-in WiFi makes it perfect for connected projects.

name: Arduino Nano
description: The Arduino Nano is a small, complete, and breadboard-friendly board based on the ATmega328. It has more or less the same functionality of the Arduino Duemilanove.

name: Raspberry Pi Pico
description: The Raspberry Pi Pico is a tiny, fast, and versatile board built using RP2040, a brand new microcontroller chip designed by Raspberry Pi in the UK.

name: BME680 Environmental Sensor
description: The BME680 is an integrated environmental sensor developed specifically for mobile applications and wearables where size and low power consumption are key requirements.

name: VL53L0X Time-of-Flight Distance Sensor
description: The VL53L0X is a Time-of-Flight (ToF) laser-ranging module that provides accurate distance measurement regardless of the target reflectances.

name: L298N Motor Driver Module
description: The L298N is a dual H-Bridge motor driver which allows speed and direction control of two DC motors at the same time. Perfect for robotics projects.

name: SG90 Micro Servo Motor
description: The SG90 is a small and lightweight servo motor with high output power. It is perfect for small robotics projects, RC vehicles, and automated mechanisms.

name: NRF24L01 Wireless Module
description: The NRF24L01 is a single chip 2.4GHz transceiver with an embedded baseband protocol engine. Perfect for wireless communication between microcontrollers.

name: HC-05 Bluetooth Module
description: The HC-05 is a Bluetooth SPP (Serial Port Protocol) module designed for transparent wireless serial connection setup. It can be configured as Master or Slave.

name: NEO-6M GPS Module
description: The NEO-6M GPS module is a complete GPS receiver with high sensitivity and low power consumption. It features a built-in antenna and EEPROM.

name: 0.96 Inch OLED Display
description: This 0.96 inch OLED display features 128x64 pixels and uses I2C communication. It is perfect for displaying sensor data, menus, and small graphics.

name: Breadboard 830 Points
description: This 830 tie-point breadboard is perfect for prototyping electronic circuits. It has adhesive backing and fits most Arduino and Raspberry Pi projects.

name: Jumper Wire Kit 120pcs
description: A comprehensive kit of 120 jumper wires in various lengths and colors. Essential for any electronics project involving breadboards or prototyping.

name: Power Supply Module 3.3V/5V
description: This breadboard power supply module provides regulated 3.3V and 5V outputs from a 6.5-12V input. Features an ON/OFF switch and power indicator LED.

name: 18650 Battery Holder
description: This battery holder accommodates one 18650 lithium-ion battery. Features built-in protection circuit and standard 2-pin connector.

name: TP4056 Charging Module
description: The TP4056 is a complete constant-current/constant-voltage linear charger for single cell lithium-ion batteries. Features overcharge and overdischarge protection.

name: IR Infrared Sensor Module
description: This IR sensor module can detect infrared radiation and is commonly used in line-following robots, obstacle detection, and motion sensing applications.

name: MQ-2 Gas Sensor
description: The MQ-2 gas sensor is sensitive to LPG, i-butane, propane, methane, alcohol, hydrogen and smoke. Widely used in gas leakage detecting equipment.

name: Soil Moisture Sensor
description: This soil moisture sensor can read the amount of moisture present in the soil surrounding it. Perfect for automated gardening and plant monitoring systems.

name: PIR Motion Sensor
description: PIR (Passive Infrared) sensors allow you to sense motion by measuring infrared light radiating from objects in its field of view. Perfect for security systems.

name: Sound Sensor Module
description: This sound sensor module detects sound intensity. Features an onboard potentiometer for sensitivity adjustment and both analog and digital outputs.

name: Relay Module 5V 1-Channel
description: This 5V relay module is perfect for controlling high voltage devices using low voltage signals from microcontrollers. Features optocoupler isolation.

name: Relay Module 5V 4-Channel
description: This 4-channel relay module allows you to control 4 high voltage devices simultaneously. Each channel has independent control and LED indicators.

name: LED Kit 5mm 3mm
description: A comprehensive kit containing 5mm and 3mm LEDs in various colors (red, green, blue, yellow, white). Perfect for indicator lights and basic lighting projects.

name: Resistor Kit 400pcs
description: This resistor kit contains 400 resistors in 20 different values ranging from 10Ω to 1MΩ. All resistors are 1/4W with 5% tolerance.

name: Capacitor Kit 500pcs
description: A comprehensive capacitor kit containing ceramic and electrolytic capacitors in various values. Essential for any electronics repair or project.

name: Transistor Kit 200pcs
description: This transistor kit contains 200 pieces of common NPN and PNP transistors including BC547, BC557, 2N2222, and 2N3904. Perfect for switching and amplification circuits.

name: Arduino Starter Kit
description: The ultimate starter kit for Arduino beginners. Includes Arduino Uno R3, breadboard, sensors, LEDs, resistors, jumper wires, and comprehensive project guide.

name: Raspberry Pi 4 Complete Kit
description: Everything you need to get started with Raspberry Pi 4. Includes Pi 4 4GB, case with fan, power supply, 32GB SD card, HDMI cables, and heat sinks.

name: ESP32-CAM Development Board
description: The ESP32-CAM is a development board with an ESP32-S chip, OV2640 camera, and microSD card slot. Perfect for video streaming and image recognition projects.
